visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a bright, high-ceilinged warehouse environment. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse and black pants, stands in front of stacks of product boxes. She holds a large white bag featuring Japanese text and images of fried snacks, smiling broadly and gesturing towards the camera. (2) The shot moves to a closer view of the product. The woman points at the 10 packs label on the bag, her hands moving dynamically to highlight the package's size and contents. The background remains filled with bulk-packaged goods and warehouse signage. (3) The camera pans left to show neighboring shelves stocked with different snack items, specifically identifying bags of codfish snacks. The lighting is consistent and industrial, illuminating rows of stacked boxes. (4) The scene transitions to a domestic living room. Two women are seated at a table; the first woman is now accompanied by another woman wearing a red bucket hat and a yellow-striped shirt. They have the opened squid snack bag and a small bowl on the table between them. (5) A close-up shows the woman in the red hat taking a piece of the snack from the bowl. She looks at the light-brown, breaded strip with a skeptical expression before taking a bite. Her face registers clear disappointment as she begins to chew. (6) Both women engage in an animated discussion, holding up both the large squid snack bag and the codfish snack bag. They use hand gestures, including crossing their arms in an X shape, to visually signal a negative recommendation of the product.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 不要再去日本扛! 魷魚天婦羅大王. (2) [Subtitle]: 來自日本. (3) [Subtitle]: 現在不用去日本扛. (4) [Subtitle]: 這裡買得到. (5) [Variety]: 好大一包哦. (6) [Subtitle]: 好市多進了超多日本零食. (7) [Subtitle]: 449元裡面有10包. (8) [Subtitle]: 一包44.9元啊. [Variety]: WOW. (9) [Subtitle]: 你確定不考慮旁邊鱈魚香絲就在後面了. (10) [Subtitle]: 從小吃到大啊. (11) [Subtitle]: 來試試看這個值不值得. [Variety]: 偶也要出國一下. (12) [Subtitle]: 也不是啊那麼大包放那個行李箱不方便. (13) [Subtitle]: 我們來試試看吧. (14) [Variety]: 臺灣也不用扛了. (15) [Subtitle]: 因為我們吃下來好意外哦. (16) [Subtitle]: 我真的覺得味道跟鱈魚香絲很接近. (17) [Subtitle]: 那不如買鱈魚香絲. (18) [Subtitle]: 它這樣子一包45塊. (19) [Subtitle]: 我們倒出來以後是長這樣. (20) [Subtitle]: 我覺得鱈魚香絲還比較好吃. (21) [Subtitle]: 因為它外面它中間的魷魚很香. (22) [Subtitle]: 但是外面的粉裹太厚. [Variety]: 裹太厚. (23) [Subtitle]: 然後那個粉吃起來就是一團麵粉. (24) [Subtitle]: 就真的只是麵粉也沒有任何調味. (25) [Subtitle]: 既不酥也不脆. (26) [Subtitle]: 就整個是濕濕軟軟的麵團. (27) [Subtitle]: 然后裹在那个里面那个鱿鱼干外面. (28) [Subtitle]: 就是喔. [Variety]: 整個是打咩唷. (29) [Subtitle]: 這覺得有點可惜.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main creators appearing together in the second half of the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a white long-sleeved blouse; the other woman wears a red bucket hat and a yellow and white striped shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a Costco warehouse with high ceilings and rows of stacked cardboard boxes of snacks. The second location is a brightly lit indoor living room with a dining table and home decorations.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice delivers a high-energy, upbeat introduction in Mandarin, speaking rapidly with a bright pitch. A rhythmic, mid-tempo electronic BGM with prominent synthesized beats plays in the background, maintaining a consistent energy level throughout the opening segment. (2) The BGM continues as the speaker discusses product details, with her voice exhibiting high pitch variability to emphasize price and quantity. Occasional sharp whoosh sound effects mark transitions between different pieces of visual information. (3) A second female voice enters, characterized by an expressive and slightly exaggerated tone. The two voices interact dynamically, with the second speaker's arousal levels increasing as she prepares to taste the snack. (4) Loud sounds of plastic bag rustling occur as the packaging is manipulated. A soft, muffled clink of a ceramic bowl being placed on the table is audible, followed by brief chewing sounds as the tasting begins. (5) The conversation turns critical, with both speakers using a teasing and sarcastic tone. A digital ding sound effect highlights a specific point of criticism regarding the snack's texture. (6) The BGM remains steady, but the vocal intensity increases as they deliver a final negative verdict. A final pop sound effect accompanies a visual gesture of rejection, ending the audio track with high emotional energy.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Intro -> Feature Highlight -> Contrast/Comparison -> Final Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A critical food review targeting a popular imported snack at Costco. The video uses a two-part structure to debunk the product's appeal, emphasizing technical issues like thick, soggy batter and recommending a local alternative instead of the hyped Japanese import.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The review is overwhelmingly negative regarding the product's taste and texture, suggesting a consumer-driven critique rather than a paid promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high speech density and fast editing pace are typical of social-native short-form content intended for high engagement.
